name: Old Fashioned
garnish: Orange slice or twist, and a cocktail cherry
instructions: Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitters, add a few drops of water. Muddle until dissolved. Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey. Stir gently.

name: Dry Martini
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well and strain into a chilled martini glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with an olive.

name: Manhattan
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Negroni
instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into an old fashioned glass filled with ice. Stir gently.

name: Daiquiri
instructions: Shake all ingredients well with ice cubes, then strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Whiskey Sour
garnish: Half an orange slice and a cocktail cherry
instructions: If using egg white, dry shake all ingredients first without ice. Then add ice and shake vigorously again. Strain into an old fashioned glass filled with ice.

name: Margarita
instructions: Rub the rim of the glass with a lime wedge and dip it in salt. Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into the prepared glass.

name: Mojito
instructions: Muddle mint sprigs with sugar and lime juice in the highball glass. Add a splash of soda water and fill the glass with crushed ice. Pour the rum and top with more soda water. Stir gently from the bottom up.

name: Sidecar
instructions: Shake all ingredients well with ice cubes, then strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

name: Bloody Mary
instructions: Stir ingredients gently with ice in a mixing glass (or roll between two glasses) and strain into a highball glass filled with ice.

name: Gin Fizz
instructions: Shake gin, lemon juice, and syrup with ice. Strain into a highball glass without ice, then top up with soda water.

name: Sazerac
instructions: Rinse a chilled old fashioned glass with absinthe and discard the excess. In another glass, muddle the sugar cube and bitters with a few drops of water. Add cognac and ice, stir well, and strain into the absinthe-rinsed glass.

name: Boulevardier
instructions: Pour all ingredients into a mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well and strain into a chilled glass.

name: Last Word
instructions: Shake all ingredients vigorously with ice and strain into a chilled coupe glass.
